steps.title: Identify initial members and daily increase
steps.content: We start with the initial number of members on the first day: $80$. Each day after that, $15$ new members join, so the growth rate is $15$ members per day. The total after $d$ days is therefore $$M = 80 + 15d.$$

steps.title: Compute members after 4 days
steps.content: Substitute $d = 4$ into the formula: $$M = 80 + 15 \times 4 = 80 + 60 = 140.$$ B is correct.
